productDisplayName: Forever New Women Floral Purple Dress
description: CompositionPurple wrap dress made of 100% silk with a 100% polyester lining, has floral print, spaghetti straps, frills from the neckline to hem, belt at the waist with a slit for it to go through and a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash care Cold hand wash inside out separately with gentle detergent Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Drip dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Dry cleanable Fun, feminine and flirty are the highlights of this floral printed wrap dress from forever new. Bask in the liquidy softness of silk and the appreciative glances you get when you wear this pretty dress. Ideal for casual occasions, whether it's day or night. Team it with pretty footwear and delicate accessories for a perfect ensemble.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in dressesHeight-5.9", Chest-33"
